feedback.text: Hej, I am reporting to hear about it, because we can now stop accessing games and software that we have bought, but the company chooses to save behind subscriptions later or simply switch off the server to drive the products here. There is a wiki side of games that people paid for as they later could not play because the company chose not to host it more without a plan for how the game could be hosted by the player later. Dead game list Mange thanks! —Eik
